title: v0.30.7
description: What's Changed docs: update Zod example to use native toJSONSchema by @fuleinist in #14746 launch: use native Windows Hermes config path by @BruceMacD in #16558 New Contributors @fuleinist made their first contribution in #14746 Full Changelog : v0.30.6...v0.30.7-rc1

title: v0.30.7-rc0
description: launch: use native Windows Hermes config path ( #16558 )

title: v0.30.6
description: New models Gemma 4 QAT weights : the Gemma 4 family is now optimized with Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) to dramatically reduce memory requirements and maximize on-device performance. Look for the tags ending in -qat : gemma4:e2b-it-qat gemma4:e4b-it-qat gemma4:12b-it-qat gemma4:26b-a4b-it-qat gemma4:31b-it-qat What's Changed ollama launch omp now integrates with Oh My Pi , an AI coding agent with IDE integration MLX embedding layers now use NVFP4 global scale for improved quantization on App

title: v0.30.5
description: What's Changed Fixed the gemma4:12b floating point exception crash on x86, CUDA, Linux, and Windows systems. ollama launch hermes-desktop now launches Hermes Desktop and can skip rebuilding when a packaged desktop app is already installed. ollama launch hermes now supports native Windows installs through the Hermes PowerShell installer. Added Cline CLI integration docs. Full Changelog : v0.30.4...v0.30.5

title: v0.30.5-rc0: llama.cpp version update (#16511)
description: Bump llama.cpp to b9509, which includes the upstream Gemma 4 12B multimodal projector fixes for the n_head=0 divide-by-zero crash seen on x86/CUDA/Linux/Windows. Fixes #16479 Fixes #16489 Fixes #16491 Fixes #16492 Fixes #16495

title: v0.30.4
description: New models Nemotron-3-Ultra : NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is built for high-throughput reasoning and long-running agent workflows. What's Changed Fixed multimodal models not using GPU on the llama.cpp backend can now use Metal GPU offload on Apple Silicon, improving multimodal performance on supported Macs. ollama create --experimental now respects REQUIRES in Modelfiles for MLX-based models. ollama launch codex now cleans up old conflicting Codex profile config before launching. ollama launch pi no

title: v0.30.4-rc1: llama-server: fix gemma4 patch wiring (#16477)
description: This will fix the "clip.cpp:4399: Unknown projector type" crash.

title: v0.30.4-rc0: Kill llama-server during Windows cleanup (#16458)
description: Windows installer and app cleanup could leave llama-server.exe running when ollama.exe was killed directly, so cleanup now includes llama-server.exe and taskkill /T.

title: v0.30.3
description: New models Gemma 4 12B : high-performance multimodal intelligence that runs directly on laptops, combining efficiency with advanced reasoning. What's Changed Added support for gemma4:12b . Full Changelog : v0.30.2...v0.30.3
